query: UPDATE receipt_reviews SET productImageUrl = NULL WHERE productImageUrl IS NOT NULL AND productImageUrl != '' AND productImageUrl NOT LIKE '%cropped-products%'
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user ViCMbGRGvoSuVwV.root --database GgA9WvTBCZMf6mjyMMwACw --execute UPDATE receipt_reviews SET productImageUrl = NULL WHERE productImageUrl IS NOT NULL AND productImageUrl != '' AND productImageUrl NOT LIKE '%cropped-products%'
